chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1048 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 14-11-2022 Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Ms. Munawar Fatima advocate holds brief for Mr. K.B. Lutuf Ali Laghari advocate for applicant. Mr. Imran Ali Abbasi A.P.G. Sindh. Applicant is present and submits that as a result of compromise he has been acquitted by the trial Court vide order dated 27.10.2022, he has placed copy of such order. In view of above, this application is disposed of. Notice to surety is hereby recalled and further surety papers be returned to the surety on verification and identification as per rules. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
